ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Friday, April 26th, from 10:00 PM to 12:00 AM (UTC). During this time, VPN connections will be unavailable.

Please plan your work accordingly. If you experience any issues after the maintenance window, contact IT Support at support@example.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

URGENT: The Payroll Department has identified an issue with your latest payroll submission. To ensure that your salary is processed correctly and to avoid any potential deductions, you must verify your banking details immediately.

Please click the link below to confirm your information:
<URL>

Failure to verify by 5:00 PM today may result in delayed or incorrect payment.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Payroll Compliance Team
